title: Paddy's Hand-Drawn Textures
description: A 100% hand-drawn Minecraft texture-pack using ballpoint pens.
body:
# Paddy's Hand-Drawn Textures

## About this texture pack

Do you wish you could jump right into a sketchbook full of Minecraft drawings? Or maybe you just want to play with textures resembling concept art?

Then this resource pack is perfect for you!
Every texture is hand-drawn with blue ballpoint pens on real paper, giving your game a unique and refreshing look.

With its monochromatic appearance, it adds a new challenge while immersing you in a world where creativity comes to life.

**Resolution:** 512x512

## Screenshots

![The enderdragon and some endermen in the end dimension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vkFqYHBT/images/0e54301a32dcd65d6a70f95a99d24e1a000e2d0b.jpeg)

![Overworld wood types (without bamboo)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vkFqYHBT/images/6b2854dc1f38cc5f5cb9ff40313048d3daee862b.jpeg)

![Some functional blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vkFqYHBT/images/7e4496be84660dcb781f9f7af5a7184a83c937a2.jpeg)

## How to use

1. Download the pack for the current version.
2. Move the downloaded zip-file to Minecraft's resource pack folder.

## Additional note

This project is still a work in progress. The goal of this project is to eventually include every single texture.

If you want to stay up to date with the progress you might also want to check out my [YouTube-Channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCZkyo1y266HHDYGu6C4Qowg) or the [playlist](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLG3T9rJGESvakYI7C1hQ-rFzvr_au6iFY) about this project.
